name: Eat Food
description: a soft munch-and-satisfied blip of eating food
usage: Eating a food item to restore energy.

ai.prompt: Eating food: a couple of soft organic bites and chews with subtle mouth foley, then a small satisfied cue, natural and not cartoonish. High-fidelity recorded foley, close-miked, crisp transient, rich body, natural short tail; single isolated sound; dry with only a subtle natural room; no music, no voice, no melody, no chiptune, no synth beeps, no background noise; broadcast-quality, production-ready.
